name: Seamless Distribution Systems AB (publ)
summary: Seamless Distribution Systems AB (publ), a technology and digital distribution company, provides technology solutions to telecom operators and retail distributors worldwide. The company provides electronic topup, voucher management system, and value added services, as well as micro credit and mobile financial services. It also offers promotion and marketing services, promotional campaigns, professional services, and consultancy and trainings. The company was founded in 2014 and is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
